title: Tsuwr #6698
definition:
Zur = "rock"

 1) father of Cozbi and one of the 5 Midianite princes who were slain
    when Balaam fell
 2) son of Jehiel, the father or leader of Gibeon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zur = "rock"

 1) father of Cozbi and one of the 5 Midianite princes who were slain
    when Balaam fell
 2) son of Jehiel, the father or leader of Gibeon

    NASB:  rock, a Midianite, also a Gibeonite
